instruction: In ~/Desktop/photos_hard, recursively collect only .jpg files into ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard while preserving directory hierarchy. Exclude any file under a private directory and any filename containing _raw. Then create ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/manifest.txt containing sha256 and relative path for copied jpgs only, sorted by relative path.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

parameters.command:
rm -rf ~/Desktop/photos_hard ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard; mkdir -p ~/Desktop/photos_hard/trip/a ~/Desktop/photos_hard/trip/private ~/Desktop/photos_hard/family ~/Desktop/photos_hard/events/sub; printf 'img1
' > ~/Desktop/photos_hard/trip/a/sun.jpg; printf 'img2
' > ~/Desktop/photos_hard/events/sub/night.jpg; printf 'img3
' > ~/Desktop/photos_hard/family/portrait_raw.jpg; printf 'img4
' > ~/Desktop/photos_hard/trip/private/secret.jpg; printf 'png
' > ~/Desktop/photos_hard/family/us.png

result.command: sun_ok='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/trip/a/sun.jpg ] && sun_ok='true'; night_ok='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/events/sub/night.jpg ] && night_ok='true'; no_raw='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/family/portrait_raw.jpg ] && no_raw='true'; no_private='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/trip/private/secret.jpg ] && no_private='true'; manifest_ok='false'; expected=$(printf '%s\n' "$(sha256sum ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/events/sub/night.jpg | awk '{print $1}')  events/sub/night.jpg" "$(sha256sum ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/trip/a/sun.jpg | awk '{print $1}')  trip/a/sun.jpg" | sort); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/cpjpg_hard/manifest.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] && manifest_ok='true'; echo "sun_ok=$sun_ok"; echo "night_ok=$night_ok"; echo "no_raw=$no_raw"; echo "no_private=$no_private"; echo "manifest_ok=$manifest_ok"
